title: ARIA — AI Personal Assistant
summary: Local AI-powered personal assistant that tracks your daily computer activity, remembers your tasks, and helps you plan your day. Powered entirely by the Gemini API for natural language reasoning.
highlights: Deep integration with the Gemini API.

title: ARIA Web Dashboard
summary: A web-based extension of the ARIA AI personal assistant. Provides a React frontend and FastAPI backend to track daily computer activity, manage tasks, and help you plan your day.
highlights: React and TypeScript frontend for responsive UI.
FastAPI backend for high-performance API routing.
Integrated with the Gemini API for intelligent task management.

title: LYRA — Terminal AI
summary: A JARVIS-inspired terminal AI with a British accent. Powered by Gemini, she listens, speaks, and controls your computer — all directly from the command line.
highlights: Voice interaction with text-to-speech (TTS) and speech-to-text (STT).
Computer control and automation via terminal.
